ol.li: Application Logic: Determines logical block addresses (LBA) using the Inode Buffer.
VFS / Kernel: Intercepts via syscall, performs DAC/MAC permission checks, and verifies the Page Cache.
IO Subsystem: If a cache miss occurs, the I/O Scheduler generates a Block I/O (BIO) request.
Hardware: The Controller fetches data from physical NAND; DMA bypasses the CPU to populate Kernel pages directly.

g.text: uint64_t, offset: uint64_t, buf: void*, len: size_t): ssize_t
int, buf: char*, count: size_t): ssize_t
